title: Asalem Jarigindi
overview: Sriram is a well-settled doctor who wants to do good for his village. For every Amavasya, there is a death in the village and it becomes sensational. In this scenario, a superpower tries to take over the heroine by killing her parents. Sriram then decides to chase the mystery behind it. Is he successful in decoding the mystery? What is the reason for the deaths? Who is behind it? What happens in the end forms the rest of the story.
